# box

**Instance Property**

A copy of the box on the page this thumbnail was generated from.

## Declaration

```swift
var box: AssignableDocument.QuestionBox
```

## Inspecting thumbnail data

- **image**: The thumbnail image of the question.
- **pageID**: The ID of the page this thumbnail was generated from.
